summary: DHH mentions a potential business opportunity that could take him to Seattle and shares his discovery of a local recommendations page called 'Seattle Area Secrets.' He expresses enthusiasm for authentic, personal travel recommendations over commercial travel magazine suggestions, listing specific places he'd like to visit.
key_points: A business opportunity may bring DHH to Seattle
He discovered a personal recommendations page for Seattle attractions
Personal, authentic recommendations are more valuable than commercial travel guides
money_quotes: Personal recommendations for places to go are a lot more interesting than glossy, paid ones in your regular travel magazines.
key_insight: Authentic personal recommendations beat polished commercial travel advice.
